artPrompt: An evocative scene of sanctified loophole: a humble collection plate glows with a protective cold gold halo on an altar, blessed coins drifting up untaxed into the candlelit dark, ashen congregants bowing around it as a looming clock tower watches beyond. Ongoing arcane warmth radiates from the offering. Wide landscape, bone white and gold washes bleeding into blood-dark black. Rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Tax-Exempt Status
text:
Spells you cast that have "tithe," "indulgence," or "doom" in their name cost {1} less to cast. We are a registered apocalypse.
Whenever you pay life, you gain that much life instead. (We're a nonprofit. The profit is spiritual.)
flavorText: The auditors came to investigate the cult. They left as members.
